# F-5 fixture #2 (T009 — should-fire)
# Expected gitleaks rule ID (v8.30.1): aws-access-token
# Pattern: AKIA + 16 alphanumeric (AWS access key ID format).
# CRITICAL: do NOT end with "EXAMPLE" — gitleaks default `aws-access-token`
# allow-lists `.+EXAMPLE$` (the AWS docs sample-key suppression). Ending in
# any other suffix exercises the rule honestly.
# PM-PLAN-1: if upstream renames this rule, update tests/fixtures/gitleaks-rule-interaction/run.sh
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID = "AKIAJSIE27KKMHXI3BJQ"
